mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in nominal retail sales signals strengthening household demand and improving near-term revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:January 2018 retail sales vintage was available by the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns no more often than the unconditional base rate over rolling 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate rises to a new 12-month high, tighter policy raises discount rates and financing costs, reducing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its prior 12-month maximum
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value was 1.41 for January 2018
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations generate positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the triggered mean return is not below the unconditional mean at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in unemployment of more than 0.3 percentage points over three months signals deteriorating labor demand and recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value was 4.1 for January 2018
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward returns after triggered UNRATE increases are not lower than non-triggered returns over at least two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in industrial production and payroll employment signals broad real activity expansion, improving earnings breadth and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO and PAYEMS both have positive 3-month changes
evidence_refs: fact:January 2018 INDPRO and PAYEMS vintages were available by the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive INDPRO-PAYEMS condition does not outperform cases where only one series is positive, or if its 60-day win rate is below the unconditional win rate.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer prices accelerate while the federal funds rate is rising, markets price both margin pressure and additional policy tightening, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month growth exceeds its 12-month growth while FEDFUNDS is above its 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction term between CPIAUCSL acceleration and rising FEDFUNDS has non-negative predictive sign for 20-day returns in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A downturn in housing starts below their 12-month average signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future construction activity, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its trailing 12-month average
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside crossings are followed by 60-day S&P 500 returns that are equal to or higher than returns after upside crossings in rolling walk-forward samples.

mechanism_narrative: Very low unemployment combined with a rising federal funds rate signals late-cycle capacity pressure and policy restraint, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE is below its trailing 36-month average and FEDFUNDS rises over 6 months
evidence_refs: fact:January 2018 UNRATE was near 4 percent while FEDFUNDS was in a tightening phase
failure_condition: Reject if the low-UNRATE rising-FEDFUNDS state has a non-negative average excess 60-day return versus all other states across two consecutive 5-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A short-term acceleration in consumer prices raises expected inflation and near-term discount-rate pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth crosses above its trailing 12-month growth rate
evidence_refs: fact:January 2018 CPIAUCSL vintage was available by the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if CPIAUCSL acceleration crossings are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than the unconditional positive-return frequency over rolling 3-year windows.
